debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w : ℕ
args : Vector (ZMod p) w
cs : Clap.Cs p (ZMod p)
i : ℕ
h : i < w
h' : ¬args[i] = 0
h'' : ¬args[i] = 1
⊢ Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ (Clap.assert_bits_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args cs) = denotation.n

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
revert cs
  induction w with
  | zero =>
      intro cs
      exact (False.elim (Nat.not_lt_zero i h'))
  | succ w ih =>
      intro cs
      have hi : i = 0 ∨ ∃ j, i = j.succ := Nat.eq_zero_or_exists_eq_succ i
      rcases hi with rfl | ⟨j, rfl⟩
      · unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl assert_bit_e
        simp [Cs.eval, h', h'']
      · have hj : j < w := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h'
        have : ¬ assert_bits (args.extract 1) := by
          unfold assert_bits
          refine (by
            intro hbits
            have : (args.extract 1)[j] = args[j.succ] := by
              simp [Vector.getElem_extract, hj, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
            have h0 : ¬ (args.extract 1)[j] = 0 := by simpa [this] using h'
            have h1 : ¬ (args.extract 1)[j] = 1 := by simpa [this] using h''
            unfold assert_bits at hbits
            have := (Vector.all_eq_true).1 hbits j hj
            simp [beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, Bool.or_eq_true, decide_eq_true_eq, h0, h1] at this)
        unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl assert_bit_e
        exact ih (w := w) (args := args.extract 1)
          (cs := Cs.eq0 (Exp.v args.head * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v args.head)) cs) this
